'''Team Slashrat''' was one of the five [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] strike-teams sent to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] as part of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] mission code-named [[Operation Roundabout]]. Consisting of [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] and a second, unspecified Jedi, their mission was to monitor starfighter activity at [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet's]] primary spaceport. Their mission was largely futile, however, as Corellia had already deployed almost every starfighter that could fly to space to ambush the [[Second Fleet]].

Unlike the other Jedi strike-teams, however, Slashrat remained on Corellia following the of Operation Roundabout, and Corran, as leader of Corellia's small Jedi enclave, took them into hiding.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
